ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jan-30-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:33 9:46am.

Plaintiff Flockjay Inc. appearing represented by Rodney Mayr, Esq. via zoom.
Defendant Merratas Inc. not appearing.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's request for interest and it's justification for attorney fees. Court reviews declaration of counsel re: attorney fees.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines Plaintiff SHWWN HATHIRAMANI and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Flockjay Inc., and against Defendant Meratas Inc., as follows:

Damages: $63,663.00
Prejudgment Interest: $19,697.74
Attorney Fees: $1,610.00
Costs: $728.63
Waiting Time Penalty: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $85,699.37

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.
